headline: US Oil Rig Count Jumps amid Rising Crude Prices
summary: The total number of active drilling rigs for oil and gas in the United States rose this week, according to new data that Baker Hughes published on Friday, bringing the total rig count in the US to 551, down 25 from this same time last year.
